title: Seedance Asset Library

external_references.use_scope: structure inspiration only; do not copy Higgsfield logo, text, footage, or exact storyboard drawings
external_references.extracted_pattern: Top: finished cinematic hero shot. Bottom: storyboard panels with shot size, lens, camera move, subject action, location, and finale note.

external_references.use_scope: structure inspiration only; do not copy footage, screenshots, people, charts, captions, or visual assets
external_references.extracted_pattern: Autonomous system story: dense dashboard, live metrics, pipeline operations, data panels, and a console-like proof surface.
